title: The Weimar Republic
description: Overview of the cultural life and artistic output during the Weimar Republic, the German state between 1918-1933. Taught entirely in German.
prerequisites: 3 hours of advanced German or consent of instructor.

title: Advanced German II (Written Communication)
description: Intensive practice in written German through an exploration of civilization topics.
